title: fynns butter mod (discontiniued)
description:
adds butter ore and more butter 

i had to reset my windows and forget i didnt save the source and now its gone im sorry
body:
### **what is buttermod?**
the name says it it adds butter but not as you would think but that will be said to you in Features

### **Features**
it adds butterore you need atleast a diamond pickaxe to mine butterore and you need to smelts it to get a butteringot.
with a butteringot you can get a buttersword,butterpickaxe,butteraxe and a buttershovel also a butterblock wich can be crafted with 9 butteringots.

### **does it add mobs?**
yes it does it adds a buttercreeper and more mobs soon the buttercreeper is very fast and spawns naturally.

### **is there a butterdemension?**
yes there is it is just so op you can get unlimited butter there so check it out. you need 14 butterblocks to build the portal and a special flint and butter.



the mod is made with mcreator.
